name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Netsh Port Forwarding
notes:
This Building Block detects netsh commands that configure a port forwarding.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), omkar72, oscd.community, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel
SIGMA Title: New Port Forwarding Rule Added Via Netsh.EXX
SIGMA Description: Detects the execution of netsh commands that configure a new port forwarding (PortProxy) rule


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Netsh Port Forwarding on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of netsh.exe

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%interface%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%portproxy%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%add%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%v4tov4%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%i %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%p %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%a %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%v %') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%connectp%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%listena%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c=%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Netsh Port Forwarding on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of netsh.exe

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%interface%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%portproxy%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%add%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%v4tov4%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%i %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%p %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%a %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%v %') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%connectp%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%listena%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c=%') AQL filter query
